user.title: Add or set up Octo Bed
user.description: Choose how to add or set up an Octo bed.

confirm.title: Octo Bed found
confirm.description: Do you want to add the Octo Bed at {address}?

pin.title: Enter PIN
pin.description: The 4-digit PIN is required to establish a connection with your Octo bed. You can find this in your bed's manual or app.

pair_existing.title: Pair two beds
pair_existing.description: Select the two beds to combine into one "Both beds" device. Each bed stays as its own device; the paired device adds shared controls.

error.invalid_address: Invalid Bluetooth address. Use format AA:BB:CC:DD:EE:FF (12 hex characters).
error.pin_rejected: The bed rejected this PIN. Check the PIN and try again.
error.device_unavailable: Device not reachable. Ensure the bed is on and in range (or Bluetooth proxy is connected).

abort.need_two_beds: At least two beds are required to pair. Add another bed first.
abort.entry_not_found: One of the selected beds is no longer available.
abort.pair_created: Paired device "Both beds" has been created.
abort.already_paired: These two beds are already paired.

data.single_cover_for_homekit: Single cover for HomeKit (one cover per bed)

error.invalid_range: Head and feet travel must be between 5 and 120 seconds.
